events.label: assistant
events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: the gauge rose from 457 to 549 microns (Δ92) over the 10-minute isolation, staying under 1000 microns — consistent with residual moisture/non-condensable outgassing rather than a gross leak, but it still fails the standard <500-micron standing-decay acceptance criterion. Called `fail`/medium risk with corrective actions (extended triple evacuation with nitrogen sweep, retest decay, escalate to nitrogen leak isolation if the rise persists) rather than charging the system.
